scripts.echidna:sanity: docker run --rm --platform linux/amd64 --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" -e HOME=/tmp -v "$PWD:/code" -w /code ghcr.io/crytic/echidna/echidna:v2.2.4 echidna . --contract EchidnaSanity --config echidna.config.yaml

scripts.echidna:all: npx hardhat compile && rm -rf echidna-corpus && npm run echidna:sanity && rm -rf echidna-corpus && npm run echidna:token && rm -rf echidna-corpus && npm run echidna:manager && rm -rf echidna-corpus && npm run echidna:amm && rm -rf echidna-corpus && npm run echidna:phase && rm -rf echidna-corpus && npm run echidna:amm-econ && rm -rf echidna-corpus && npm run echidna:reserve && rm -rf echidna-corpus && npm run echidna:deltaverifier && rm -rf echidna-corpus && npm run echidna:deltaverifier-multi && rm -rf echidna-corpus && npm run echidna:vesting && rm -rf echidna-corpus && npm run echidna:escrow && rm -rf echidna-corpus && npm run echidna:funding && rm -rf echidna-corpus && npm run echidna:router && rm -rf echidna-corpus && npm run echidna:timelock
scripts.test:e2e:sepolia: SEPOLIA_E2E_READONLY=1 npx hardhat test test/e2e/sepolia-end-to-end.test.js --network sepolia
scripts.test:e2e:sepolia:write: SEPOLIA_E2E_WRITE=1 npx hardhat test test/e2e/sepolia-end-to-end.test.js --network sepolia
